title: Senior Financial Analyst - FreeCharge - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - FreeCharge - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at FreeCharge are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About FreeCharge:
FreeCharge is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreeCharge!
